ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the research study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "research_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research lead */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Amount of funding received */,
  "study_objective" TEXT /* Objective of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_research_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("research_lead_id") REFERENCES research_leads ("research_lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "taxonomic_classification" TEXT /* Taxonomic classification of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the region */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "islands" (
  "island_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each island */,
  "island_name" TEXT /* Name of the island */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the island is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the island */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the island in square kilometers */,
  "elevation" TEXT /* Elevation of the island in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("island_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stage */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the penguin life stage */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stage */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each individual penguin */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the species of the penguin */,
  "island_id" INTEGER /* ID of the island where the penguin is located */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the life stage of the penguin */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the penguin */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the penguin */,
  "banding_date" TEXT /* Banding date of the penguin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES stages ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_island_id FOREIGN KEY ("island_id") REFERENCES islands ("island_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the sample belongs to */,
  "individual_id" TEXT /* ID of the individual penguin */,
  "clutch_completion" TEXT /* Indicates if the clutch is complete */,
  "date_egg" TEXT /* Date the egg was observed */,
  "culmen_length" REAL /* Length of the culmen in mm */,
  "culmen_depth" REAL /* Depth of the culmen in mm */,
  "flipper_length" REAL /* Length of the flipper in mm */,
  "body_mass" REAL /* Mass of the body in grams */,
  "delta_15_n" REAL /* Delta 15 N isotopic value */,
  "delta_13_c" REAL /* Delta 13 C isotopic value */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_leads" (
  "research_lead_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research lead */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("research_lead_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the study */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the study was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isotope_data" (
  "isotope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isotopic data record */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the isotopic data belongs to */,
  "delta_15_n" REAL /* Delta 15 N isotopic value */,
  "delta_13_c" REAL /* Delta 13 C isotopic value */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the isotopic analysis was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isotope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_isotope_data_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "physical_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each physical measurement */,
  "individual_id" TEXT /* ID of the individual penguin */,
  "culmen_length" REAL /* Length of the culmen in mm */,
  "culmen_depth" REAL /* Depth of the culmen in mm */,
  "flipper_length" REAL /* Length of the flipper in mm */,
  "body_mass" REAL /* Mass of the body in grams */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the physical measurement was taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_physical_measurements_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_funders" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "funder_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funder */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of funding provided */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "funder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fundings" (
  "funder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funder */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the funder */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the funder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funder_id")
)
